title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model supporting 70+ languages with real-time multilingual translation and automatic language detection. The model is available via the Gemini API, Google Translate mobile apps, and Google Meet Private Preview.
writeup: The video introduces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model from Google DeepMind that supports 70+ languages with real-time multilingual translation and automatic language detection. It matters because it removes the need to specify source languages and delivers spoken output directly, rather than passing through intermediate text steps. The concrete takeaways: the model is available through the Gemini API, the Google Translate mobile apps, and Google Meet via a Private Preview.
